calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-03-2004 Text Ruling

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT DEBRA BURTON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OFF CALENDAR; First Amended Complaint filed 03/26/04. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-16-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jonathan L. Piper, Esq., Lipton & Piper (415) 362-6286, for Defendant and Moving Party Burton
Arlo Hale Smith, Esq. (415) 681-9572, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Garza
RULING:
DEFENDANT DEBRA BURTON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND: Motion To Set Aside GRANTED, responsive pleading to be filed within 5 days. Defendant's claim that the papers were not left in the trailer provides sufficient reason to set aside the default judgment. (301/AJR/DS) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Merl Tyng, Claimant and Moving Party
Deborah Burton, Defendant
Arlo Hale Smith, Esq. (415) 681-9572, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Garza
Mike Garza, Plaintiff
RULING:
CLAIMANT MERL TYNG'S CLAIM TO RIGHT OF POSSESSION: HEARING HELD. Mike Garza, Merl Tyng and Deborah Burton sworn and examined. Plaintiff's claim of possession is valid and his right to possession is GRANTED; right to possession is STAYED for 60 days. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/KMM) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
